name: nexus-agent
description: Nexus Agent — a GUI-native AI coding agent: hexagonal local runtime + rich React frontend, driven by generic OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible APIs.
author: open-source-zjq (https://github.com/open-source-zjq)

scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
scripts.serve: npm run build -w frontend && npm run serve -w backend
